data.title: Lusha Tips: Best Ways to Boost B2B Sales in 2024
data.excerpt: Discover top Lusha tips and best practices for B2B sales prospecting. Learn how to find verified contacts and streamline your outreach. Learn more.

$media.alt: Lusha Tips: Best Ways to Boost B2B Sales in 2024

children.text: *Disclosure: This post may contain affiliate links. We may earn a commission if you make a purchase through our links, at no additional cost to you.*

Let’s talk about the sales hustle. You know the drill: hours spent hunting for decision-maker contacts, only to hit dead ends with outdated numbers or generic info@ emails. It’s a grind that slows your pipeline. That’s where a tool like
Lusha

transforms the game. I’ve been exploring how it delivers verified B2B data right from your browser, and the results are impressive. Imagine pulling a CMO’s direct phone number or work email with a single click while viewing their LinkedIn profile. That’s not a dream—it’s Lusha’s core magic. If you’re serious about filling your pipeline with quality leads, it’s time to
give Lusha a serious look
. It’s a powerhouse for anyone in B2B sales, recruiting, or partnership development.
Why Lusha Stands Out in the B2B Data Crowd

In a market full of data providers, Lusha’s approach feels refreshingly direct and user-centric. The platform’s strength lies in its simplicity and accuracy. The browser extension integrates seamlessly with LinkedIn, turning every profile into a potential goldmine of contact information. Instead of guessing or using stale data, you get real-time verified emails and phone numbers. This isn’t just about quantity; it’s about high-quality, actionable data that respects your time. The focus on verification means fewer bounced emails and more connected calls. For teams that live in their CRM, Lusha’s native integrations sync enriched data directly, keeping your sales workflow smooth and your records pristine. It’s a system built for velocity and reliability, which is why so many high-growth teams swear by it. You can dive deeper into the rationale in this
breakdown of why to choose Lusha
New & Featured Capabilities You Should Know About
Lusha isn’t resting on its laurels; the platform continuously rolls out features designed for modern GTM teams. One standout is the
Buying Intent Signals

, available in the Starter plan and above. This feature helps you prioritize leads who are actively researching solutions like yours, making your outreach incredibly timely. Another powerful addition is
Automated Email Sequences and Call Recordings with AI Insights
. You can now launch multi-touch email campaigns directly from Lusha and get AI-powered analysis on your call performance—talk about closing the loop from contact to conversation. The
AI Assistant
also helps draft personalized outreach snippets based on the enriched data. For a full tour of the latest innovations, check out our article on
Lusha’s new features
. These tools move Lusha from a simple lookup tool to a comprehensive engagement platform.
Tips & Best Ways to Use Lusha for Maximum Results
Getting value from Lusha is about smart habits, not just having access. Here are the best ways to integrate it into your daily grind:
The "Always-On" LinkedIn Lookup:

Don’t just use Lusha for cold prospecting. Install the extension and make it a habit to enrich every relevant profile you visit—whether it’s a potential customer, a candidate, or a future partner. Build your database organically as you network.
Bulk Enrich Your Existing Lists:
Got a CSV file of company domains or leads? The Pro and Premium plans let you enrich thousands of contacts in one go. This is perfect for breathing new life into old lists before a major campaign.
Pair Intent with Outreach:

Don’t just collect contacts. Use the buying intent filters to find accounts showing interest in your category. Then, use the verified direct dials to pick up the phone. This combination is powerful. Ready to see how this works in practice?
Explore Lusha’s plans
to find the fit for your team.
Leverage Lookalike Audiences:
Found a perfect-fit customer? Use the “Contact & Company Lookalikes” feature to find similar prospects. This systematically expands your ideal customer profile (ICP) targeting.
Automate the Tedious Follow-Ups:
Use the email sequence feature for initial outreach, but save the high-value direct calls for the leads that show engagement. Let automation handle the top-of-funnel nurturing.
Who Is Lusha Ideal For?
Lusha’s value shines across several roles, but it’s particularly transformative for:
Sales Development Reps (SDRs) and Account Executives (AEs):
For direct, confident outreach to decision-makers without the gatekeeper drama.
Recruiters and Talent Acquisition Teams:
To source candidates and hiring managers with accurate contact info for passive recruiting.
Partnership and Business Development Pros:
To build a network of key contacts at target companies quickly.
Growth and Marketing Teams:
To enrich lead forms and gain deeper firmographic insights for personalization.

If your role involves initiating conversations with new contacts at other companies, Lusha is designed for you. The platform scales from a single user to large teams, making it suitable for solo founders and enterprise sales floors alike. Discover more specific scenarios in our
Lusha use cases
Getting Started: A Quick Walkthrough

Jumping into Lusha is straightforward. First, create a free account—no credit card required. You’ll get 40 monthly credits to start, which is perfect for testing the waters. Next, add the browser extension for Chrome. Navigate to any LinkedIn profile, click the Lusha icon, and watch the verified contact details populate. For more structured usage, connect Lusha to your CRM (like Salesforce, HubSpot, or Pipedrive) to auto-enrich records. You can also upload CSV files for bulk enrichment. The interface is clean and intuitive; you’ll be enriching contacts within minutes of signing up. For a detailed, step-by-step walkthrough, follow our
complete guide on how to use Lusha
Pricing That Scales With Your Ambition
Lusha’s pricing is transparent and credit-based, offering flexibility. The
Free
plan is a generous starting point. The
Starter
plan is ideal for individual reps needing core features and intent signals. The
Pro
plan unlocks bulk tools, API access, and is great for small teams. The
Premium

plan, which is their most popular, is built for scaling revenue teams needing maximum credits, advanced signals, and collaborative seats. The annual billing option provides significant savings, making it a cost-effective investment when you consider the time saved and deals accelerated. You can
see the current pricing and start for free
to find your perfect fit.
Final Thought: Elevate Your Sales Game

In the end, Lusha is about removing friction from the most critical sales activity: making the right connection. It replaces uncertainty with verified data, manual research with one-click enrichment, and guesswork with intent. The tips above are just the beginning. Whether you use it to supercharge your LinkedIn prospecting, clean your CRM data, or power a multi-channel outreach sequence, the platform provides the accurate fuel your revenue engine needs. Don’t let bad data stall your growth. **
Start your free Lusha trial today
** and experience the difference verified contact information makes.

children.text: Is Lusha really free to use?

Yes, Lusha offers a permanent Free plan that includes 40 credits per month, one user seat, and access to core features like verified emails and phones. It’s a fantastic way to test the platform’s accuracy and see if it fits your workflow before committing to a paid plan.
How does Lusha get its contact data?

Lusha gathers data from a combination of community-contributed business contact information, publicly available professional sources, and data partnerships. All emails and phone numbers are run through a rigorous verification process to ensure high accuracy rates, which is a key reason for its strong reputation.
Can Lusha integrate with my existing CRM or sales tools?

Absolutely. Lusha integrates natively with major CRM platforms like Salesforce, HubSpot, and Pipedrive, as well as sales engagement tools like Outreach and Saleslova. On the Pro plan and above, you also get API access and CSV enrichment, allowing you to build custom workflows and enrich data wherever you need it.
